architecture: Monorepo: Turborepo + Bun workspaces. Apps: @ekajaya/web (Astro SSG → GitHub Pages), @ekajaya/api (TanStack Start → Cloudflare Workers). Packages: @ekajaya/config (Tailwind theme), @ekajaya/ui (shadcn + composed components), @ekajaya/schema (Zod validation), @ekajaya/http (ky client), @ekajaya/hooks (React Query wrappers), @ekajaya/database (Drizzle ORM schema + client).
conventions: Dark theme only. Accent #dd0303. Fonts: Goldman (display), Sansation (body), Share Tech Mono (mono). Forms use TanStack Form + C* composed components. No npm/yarn — Bun only.
deploy: web → GitHub Pages (main branch). api → Cloudflare Workers (main → production, beta → build-only). D1 migrations auto-run post-deploy.
recent_work: 2026-06-19: Renamed @ekajaya/admin → @ekajaya/api across monorepo. Extracted @ekajaya/database package from apps/api/src/db/ — schema, client, auth-schema, blog-schema. Ran technical audit (13/20 score), created 9 GitHub issues triaged to Project #4.
